title: Tick Control in Bed-Stuy, Brooklyn | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Bedford-Stuyvesant, Brooklyn. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Affordable rates $125-$325. Same-day service available.
intro: Bed-Stuy's beautiful brownstones, community gardens, and tree-lined streets create the perfect environment for outdoor living—but also for ticks. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Bedford-Stuyvesant, protecting your family, pets, and outdoor spaces from these disease-carrying pests. Our proven treatment methods eliminate ticks at all life stages, giving you peace of mind to enjoy your backyard and neighborhood parks safely.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Bed-Stuy residents, we understand the unique pest challenges facing Brooklyn's historic neighborhoods. Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly, pet-safe treatments that are highly effective against ticks while being mindful of the community gardens, children's play areas, and urban green spaces that make Bedford-Stuyvesant special.
localContext: From the Victorian homes along Hancock Street to the vibrant community gardens near Marcus Garvey Boulevard, Bed-Stuy's lush vegetation and outdoor gathering spaces can harbor tick populations. Our technicians are familiar with treating the backyards, tree pits, and shared green spaces common to Bed-Stuy's brownstone blocks, ensuring comprehensive protection for both private properties and adjacent common areas.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Bed-Stuy?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Bedford-Stuyvesant range from $125 to $325, depending on property size and the severity of the infestation. We provide free estimates and will assess your yard to recommend the most effective treatment plan for your specific situation.

faqs.question: Are tick treatments safe for my pets and children in my Bed-Stuy backyard?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets once dried, typically within 2-3 hours. Our treatments specifically target ticks while minimizing impact on beneficial insects and the urban ecosystem that Bed-Stuy residents value.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Brooklyn and how often should I treat?
faqs.answer: Ticks are active in Brooklyn from early spring through late fall, with peak activity from April through September. We recommend initial treatment in early spring followed by monthly or bi-monthly applications during peak season to maintain a protective barrier around your property.

faqs.question: Do you treat community gardens and shared outdoor spaces in Bed-Stuy?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with property managers, community gardens, and residential co-ops throughout Bed-Stuy to provide tick control for shared outdoor spaces. We can coordinate treatments to ensure minimal disruption to community activities while keeping these popular gathering spots safe from ticks.
